assertionResults.fullName: deriveSolverParamsFromStrategy reduces alpha when supplier is desperate
assertionResults.title: reduces alpha when supplier is desperate

assertionResults.fullName: deriveSolverParamsFromStrategy amplifies desperate savings when buyer has strong position
assertionResults.title: amplifies desperate savings when buyer has strong position

assertionResults.fullName: deriveSolverParamsFromStrategy raises alpha and flags dual-source when supplier is aggressive
assertionResults.title: raises alpha and flags dual-source when supplier is aggressive

assertionResults.fullName: deriveSolverParamsFromStrategy amplifies aggressive defense when buyer has weak position
assertionResults.title: amplifies aggressive defense when buyer has weak position

assertionResults.fullName: deriveSolverParamsFromStrategy clamps alpha multiplier to min 0.50 for desperate
assertionResults.title: clamps alpha multiplier to min 0.50 for desperate

assertionResults.fullName: deriveSolverParamsFromStrategy clamps alpha multiplier to max 1.60 for aggressive
assertionResults.title: clamps alpha multiplier to max 1.60 for aggressive

assertionResults.fullName: deriveSolverParamsFromStrategy handles missing/empty inputs gracefully
assertionResults.title: handles missing/empty inputs gracefully

assertionResults.fullName: deriveSolverParamsFromStrategy boosts confidence when high accept prob confirms desperate assessment
assertionResults.title: boosts confidence when high accept prob confirms desperate assessment

assertionResults.fullName: deriveSolverParamsFromStrategy does not adjust when priors are balanced (mixed)
assertionResults.title: does not adjust when priors are balanced (mixed)

assertionResults.fullName: deriveSolverParamsFromStrategy prefers desperate over aggressive when both above threshold but desperate higher
assertionResults.title: prefers desperate over aggressive when both above threshold but desperate higher
